paper_title: Metastable Dynamics of Chain-of-Thought Reasoning: Provable Benefits of Search, RL and Distillation

methodology.graph_structure: Dense clusters connected by sparse, low-probability edges
process: Use search to identify hard reasoning steps
Distill coarse-grained dynamics into smaller models

key_findings: Inference computation can drastically improve reasoning capabilities
Pretraining and inference are distinct computational phases
Scaling inference computation provides advantages beyond pretraining
theoretical_contributions: Expressive power and statistical efficiency of CoT
Learning on graphs as abstraction of complex reasoning tasks
title: Metastable Dynamics of Chain-of-Thought Reasoning: Provable Benefits of Search, RL and Distillation
